word: H7369 - רָחֵק - râchêq - raw-khake' - That are far

sections.paragraph:
Original: רחק

Transliteration: râchêq

Phonetic: raw-khake'

BDB Definition:

  1. removing, departing
    1. ones departing (as subst)
  2. (TWOT) remote, far

Origin: from H7368

TWOT entry: 2151a,2151b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
